title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 24 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 24 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 24 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 24/07/2025
Today, Dalian iron ore futures fluctuated rangebound, with the most-traded contract I2509 closing at 811, down 0.55% for the day.Traders sold goods according to market conditions. The market transaction atmosphere was average. The mainstream transaction prices of PB fines in the Shandong region were around 785-788 yuan/mt, down 0-3 yuan/mt from yesterday's prices; the transac- tion prices of PB fines in the Tangshan region were around 800-805 yuan/mt, basically stable compared to yesterday's prices.
